title: montanoa ovalifolia subsp. ovalifolia
intro: Montanoa ovalifolia subsp. ovalifolia is a plant species commonly known as the 'tree daisy' or 'yellow flower', which belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to Mexico and parts of Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Montanoa ovalifolia subsp. ovalifolia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Montanoa ovalifolia subsp. ovalifolia include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
